summary: Reviewer notes a date‑metadata correction but provides no details on sound or performance.
review: The lone review points out that the concert should be dated 10/06/81 rather than 01/06/81 and thanks the uploader. No comments are made about the recording quality, musical performance, or specific songs, leaving those aspects unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a neutral 3‑star rating and no substantive feedback on audio or show quality; rating defaults to midpoint.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.
